layers.name: Project Overview
layers.description: Repository-level documentation, manifests, and shared configuration that define Flippio's overall shape.

layers.name: Renderer UI
layers.description: React presentation components that drive device selection, grids, and row editing workflows.

layers.name: Renderer State
layers.description: Frontend hooks, stores, bridge code, and utilities that orchestrate renderer-side data flow.

layers.name: Tauri Backend
layers.description: Rust commands and application bootstrap code that connect Flippio to device and filesystem operations.

layers.name: Tooling And Release
layers.description: Automation, CI, and release assets that support development, packaging, and distribution.

layers.name: Examples And Tests
layers.description: Reference apps, fixtures, and automated tests that validate the app across supported flows.

layers.name: Miscellaneous
layers.description: Remaining project files that do not fit the main architectural groupings.

tour.title: Start With Project Context
tour.description: Read the repository overview and workspace manifests before following the runtime code paths.

tour.title: Trace The App Entry Points
tour.description: Follow how the React renderer and Tauri backend boot and connect to each other.

tour.title: Study Data Loading And Editing
tour.description: Focus on hooks, stores, and data components that manage tables, SQL, and row edits.

tour.title: Review Backend Device Commands
tour.description: Examine the Rust commands that perform simulator, device, and filesystem work for the renderer.

tour.title: Close With Tooling And Release
tour.description: Finish with the scripts and workflows that build, test, and ship Flippio releases.
